untranslatable_reason: Signal requires a multi-security divergence indicator comparing primary security (S&P 500) to a companion series. The allowed indicators only provide single-series metrics. price_pos_20 (normalized position within 20-bar range) is used as a proxy for relative positioning, but true divergence measurement between two independent securities cannot be constructed from single-security indicators. A custom 'divergence_indicator' input or dual-security price ratio would be required.
translation_notes: Mapped divergence_threshold_upper (75) to price_pos_20 > 0.75 (extremely overbought position) and divergence_threshold_lower (-75) to price_pos_20 < 0.25 (extremely oversold position). Exit mapped to mean reversion channel (-25 to +25 normalized range = 0.25 to 0.75 in 0-1 scale). Channel lookback_n=20 aligns with price_pos_20 indicator. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal specification.
